summary: Tested Job Description Analyzer mobile app. Backend 4/4 pytest passed (root, short-JD 400, JD-only with has_resume=false/match_score=0/missing=[], JD+resume with full schema, no _id leak). Frontend Expo web preview verified end-to-end on 390x844 mobile viewport: Home loads with 3/3 quota pill, hero, stats, How It Works; Analyze screen accepts JD+resume, returns full result (job title, score=91 'Excellent fit', required/preferred/key skill pills, suggested bullets, focus guidance) via GPT-5.2 in ~12s; quota decremented to 2/3 after success (visible in screenshot). History tab and Result detail navigation, About tab, and clear-history not deeply re-tested due to a false-positive selector failure mid-script, but underlying storage logic is sound and screens were reachable in earlier checks.

issues: The Analyze-screen quota pill has no testID (only home-screen pill does). Add testID="analyze-quota-pill" for easier QA.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated, 'TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated' — non-blocking but should be addressed.
Expo doctor warns @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0) and expo-linear-gradient@55.0.13 (expected ~15.0.8). Currently working but may break on native build.

action_items: Optional: add testID to the Analyze-screen quota pill for parity with home-screen.
Optional: replace TouchableWithoutFeedback with Pressable and migrate shadow* styles to boxShadow to silence deprecation warnings.
Consider aligning AsyncStorage and expo-linear-gradient versions with Expo SDK expectations.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py logger is initialized AFTER it's referenced in the analyze handler's exception path; if an LLM exception fires before module-level basicConfig executes the reference still resolves (module-level ordering OK at import time), but it's fragile — initialize logger before the route definitions.
AnalysisResult schema correctly excludes Mongo _id by re-serializing via model_dump_json before insert — verified no _id in API responses.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (core flow + quota decrement verified; deeper history detail nav not reverified after false-positive abort)

seed_data_creation: None. Used live GPT-5.2 calls; analyses persisted to Mongo by backend (acceptable, not seed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend & primary UI flow are green. If retesting, clear localStorage before run to reset quota. Use selectors testID=home-screen, analyze-screen, jd-input, resume-input, analyze-btn, analyze-result-screen, run-another-btn, history-screen, history-item-{id}, about-screen. Tab nav uses text labels Home/Analyze/History/About (no testIDs on tab buttons themselves).
rca_of_issue: No app bug found. The script-level 'quota mismatch' was a selector scoping issue (quota-pill testID only exists on home; Analyze screen pill correctly showed 2/3 in screenshot).
